title: Gilded Blackstone Blocks
description: Gilded Blackstone Blocks adds new building blocks, using Gilded Blackstone as a base (incl. a recipe for Gilded Blackstone).
body:
Gilded Blackstone Blocks adds new building blocks, using Gilded Blackstone as a base (incl. a recipe for Gilded Blackstone).

Gilded Blackstone blocks:
![Gilded Blackstone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b9aadefc8079b1aa7e3c81a0334bbb832aaeeb_0.webp)

![Polished Gilded Blackstone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe766a58b7148c650ab57db6d4d456d689ccdafa_0.webp)
